name: Passover Chremzlach (Stuffed Fritters)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak matzoh in water to cover for 3 to 5 minutes. Squeeze dry. Mix matzoh, currants, almonds, apricots, yolks, matzoh meal, sugar, lemon rind and juice in a bowl.
2. Beat egg whites in a separate bowl until stiff, not dry. Gently fold the egg whites into the matzoh mixture.
3. Heat 1/4 inch vegetable oil in an electric wok or deep fryer to 375°F (190°C). Drop the mixture by measuring tablespoons into the hot oil, cooking gently for 2-4 minutes, turning when the first side is golden brown.
4. Drain on paper towels. Serve at room temperature. Alternatively, crisp: Arrange in a single layer on paper-toweling-lined baking sheets and bake in a 350°F (175°C) oven for 5 minutes.
